method.candidate_universe: all TopK-256 SAE latents at seven final-token MLP sites
method.discovery_estimand: mean standardised carry-minus-no-carry activation difference within shared predicted-tens-digit strata
method.primary_success_rule: positive held-out conditional activation CI; negative carry-target inhibition; and a carry-minus-control causal CI wholly below zero
method.scope: Tests a compact carry-associated panel in the existing final-token MLP SAE basis; it does not test attention or residual-stream dictionaries.

raw_mlp_localisation.probe: standardised mean-difference direction after output-digit centring
